threats.description: A caller changes authorization scope while reusing tenant and subject fields, causing two distinct authorization contexts to share a cache key.
notes: This is the intentional candidate finding in the fixture.

threats.description: An expired bearer token is accepted before cache lookup.
notes: The response fixture records no finding for this threat.

threats.description: A test-only helper is misread as production cache-key code.
notes: The three-gate review must classify this as out-of-scope.
